name: DevOps
description: Safe shell execution, Docker sandbox testing, and self-deploy/rollback for openclaw self-modification.

sourceRepo.description: Git source repo (never modified directly). Default: /root/openclaw-fork

buildsDir.description: Parent dir for isolated build dirs. Default: /root/openclaw-builds

globalSymlink.description: Global npm symlink that production uses. Default: /usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw

sandboxPort.description: Host port for the sandbox Docker container. Default: 18790

sandboxConfigDir.description: Isolated config directory for sandbox container. Default: /root/.openclaw-sandbox

maxShellTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum allowed shell command timeout. Default: 600

autoRollbackSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for gateway health before auto-rollback. Default: 40

requireTestsPass.description: Require pnpm test to pass before promote. Default: false
